events.title: CI failure: production smoke blocked
events.requirement: Investigate the failing CI smoke signal and produce a fix plan before retrying.
events.acceptance: The task records the failed check, root cause, next check, and required gate before continuation.

events.title: Docs review: LOOP operator runbook update
events.requirement: Review the referenced runbook event and prepare the documentation update task.
events.acceptance: The queued task preserves the docs source, scope, requirement, and acceptance criteria.

events.title: Browser test: prototype regression signal
events.requirement: Run browser interaction checks against the prototype regression signal.
events.acceptance: The testing stage produces a report with pass/fail counts and failure evidence before human approval.
